title: The Matplotlib Workflow: From Data to Visualization
description: A flowchart illustrating the typical workflow and key decision points when creating a plot with Matplotlib, emphasizing best practices for Exploratory Data Analysis.
relationships: Sequential workflow from 'Import & Setup' to 'Show/Close Plot'
The 'Review & Interpret' step is a decision point that can loop back to 'Customize Plot' or 'Refine Plot' for adjustments
